headline: Who will become the next chair of BP?
summary: BP has backed Amanda Blanc to lead the search for a new chair, despite opposition from investors and City figures. headline: Exxon Mobil Weighs Venezuela Return And Valuation Upside For Investors
summary: Exxon Mobil is reportedly in talks to secure new oil production rights in Venezuela after years away from the country. The move focuses on renewed access to some of the world's largest oil reserves and could reshape the company's global asset base.
